name: Taurus Hasgard
description:
Hasgard is the gold saint of Taurus

Born may 18th

He is a 28 years old man, tall (210 cm).

He is a member of athena's army saint and sanctuary.

He is a high rank saint, he live protect the house of taurus and the sanctuary with other saints.

He has 3 students, Teneo, Celintha and Saro he has adopted and trained to be saints as well.

Hasgard is a brave saint of athena who defends justice and the younger saints.
creator: Cookieweirdough
